name: Mayra School Transportation
registry_source: Sunbiz (FL Division of Corporations) - no direct hit on attempted name variants
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record under MAYRA, MAYRA SCHOOL, MAYRA SCHOOL TRANSPORTATION, MAYRA TRANSPORTATION - likely intrastate-only Miami-Dade private school bus operator (must register with Miami-Dade PTRD, not FMCSA). No Sunbiz hit on attempted name variants via Google site: search; entity may be registered under owner's name or a non-obvious variant (e.g. possessive 'Mayra's'). Address 14708 SW 38th St, Miami, FL 33185 is residential (likely home-based small operator). Not on Miami-Dade approved private bus companies PDF.

name: Buscorp Inc
registry_source: Sunbiz - only 'BUSCORP ADVISORS GROUP INC.' found (unrelated, Lutz FL, admin dissolved 2010)
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate). No SAFER record under BUSCORP or BUSCORP INC. Address 2606 SE 23rd Ave, Cape Coral, FL 33904 is a residential property (~$767k single-family home, built 2003) per Zillow/Homes.com - public records show residents Randy Alan Armes and Robert Viera at that address. One business directory lists it as a school bus service transportation provider, 8 years in business, phone (239) 205-4202. No active 'Buscorp Inc' entity surfaced on Sunbiz under that exact name.

name: Jenda Transport Inc
registry_source: BBB Business Profile (BBB of Upstate NY); NY DOS entity not directly retrievable via WebFetch
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate). No SAFER hit under JENDA or JENDA TRANSPORT. Business is actually 'Jenda Wheelchair Transport' (DBA), a full-service wheelchair/medical transportation business owned by Donald E. Bodekor, started 2/2/2014. Listed as sole proprietorship per BBB (not a corporation despite 'Inc' in target list name). Primary address 3471 Howard Rd, Hamburg, NY 14075; secondary at 7874 Genesee Road, Springville, NY 14141; target list address 7071 Boston State Rd is also Hamburg location. Phone (716) 748-7304. Services special needs/wheelchair transport - may carry students with disabilities but not a traditional school bus operator.

Likely a small home-based intrastate Lee County school bus operator transporting students under contract with Lee County Schools.
